narrative:
Bratton Township has 913 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.3 percentage points.
